## Confidentiality checklist (required)

- [ ] No unpublished manuscript text, figures, or files are added.
- [ ] No meeting notes, transcripts, or private collaboration material are added.
- [ ] No private raw experimental inputs (e.g. unpublished raw experimental tables) are added.
- [ ] No authorship, payment, career, or personal discussion is added.
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, credentials, or private absolute paths are added.
- [ ] Only public datasets (referenced by accession) and public-data-derived outputs are added.

## Review policy

- [ ] This PR targets `main` and will be merged only after approval by the repository
      owner (**@wukonglin**), per `.github/CODEOWNERS`.
